hero.title: Objects for slower, better days.
hero.subtitle: Northline Objects · Edition 01
hero.description: A sample storefront story for independent makers: tactile essentials, honest materials, and a landing page that lets every detail breathe.

features.title: Honest materials
features.description: A product grid that foregrounds provenance, tactility, and the small details customers actually remember.

features.title: Measured editions
features.description: Flexible feature blocks for seasonal drops, signature collections, or one carefully made object.

features.title: A human hand
features.description: Editorial storytelling gives the maker, process, and purpose as much space as the product itself.

benefits.title: Explain the value before the price.
benefits.description: Lead with context and craft, then place pricing where visitors have enough information to make a considered decision.

benefits.title: Make every section portable.
benefits.description: Each Astro component accepts focused, typed data so sections can be reordered, removed, or reused without rebuilding the page.

benefits.title: Stay fast without feeling sparse.
benefits.description: Responsive images, minimal client JavaScript, and restrained glass effects keep the experience expressive and efficient.

pricing.name: Field
pricing.description: A quiet entry point for one everyday object.

pricing.name: Studio
pricing.description: The balanced edit for a desk, shelf, or thoughtful gift.

pricing.name: Archive
pricing.description: The complete first edition, collected together.

gallery.alt: Calm studio interior with natural wood furniture
gallery.caption: The studio, early light

gallery.alt: Minimal desk with a lamp and crafted objects
gallery.caption: Tools for attention

gallery.alt: Warm living space with carefully chosen objects
gallery.caption: Made to live with

testimonials.name: Mara Chen
testimonials.content: It feels less like a product page and more like opening a well-edited studio journal.

testimonials.name: Eli Navarro
testimonials.content: The structure gives the process room to matter. I can explain why an object exists before asking someone to buy it.

testimonials.name: Noor Bell
testimonials.content: Clear, calm, and unusually flexible. The sections work just as well for a single launch as a full collection.

faq.question: Does this demo include checkout or inventory?
faq.answer: No. This theme intentionally provides presentation and external calls to action only. Connect each button to the commerce or enquiry service you already use.

faq.question: Can I remove sections I do not need?
faq.answer: Yes. Every major section is a separate Astro component and the page renders optional collection fields only when data is present.

faq.question: How is the content managed?
faq.answer: The demo uses Astro 7 Content Layer data from a validated JSON entry. Replace the sample content without touching component markup.

faq.question: Is the page accessible and motion-safe?
faq.answer: Semantic headings, native details accordions, visible focus states, reduced-motion handling, and reduced-transparency fallbacks are built in.

finalCta.title: Give your next collection room to resonate.
finalCta.description: Use this sample as a starting point, connect the calls to action to your preferred external platform, and make the story your own.
